title: ATNS resolving temporary flight delays
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The Air Traffic and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Air Traffic and Navigation Services (ATNS) SOC Limited in a statement this afternoon said flight delays are currently being experienced at OR Tambo International Airport.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Air Traffic and Navigation Services (ATNS) SOC Limited in a statement this afternoon said flight delays are currently being experienced at OR Tambo International Airport."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The delays are primarily due to temporary human resource constraints at the Air Traffic Control station.","html":"The delays are primarily due to temporary human resource constraints at the Air Traffic Control station."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contingency measures have been implemented and additional resources are being deployed to stabilise operations.","html":"Contingency measures have been implemented and additional resources are being deployed to stabilise operations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These interventions are expected to resolve the situation today and progressively restore normal service levels.","html":"These interventions are expected to resolve the situation today and progressively restore normal service levels."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Safety remains our highest priority, and ATNS continues to work closely with airlines and airport partners to minimise disruptions and ensure the safe and efficient movement of air traffic.","html":"\"Safety remains our highest priority, and ATNS continues to work closely with airlines and airport partners to minimise disruptions and ensure the safe and efficient movement of air traffic."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank travellers and operators for their patience and cooperation,\" said the ATNS.","html":"\"We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank travellers and operators for their patience and cooperation,\" said the ATNS."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
